Groundhog_expression: The same day repeats, but retained memory allows different choices and self-update.
established_counterpart: learning theory / habit formation / dynamical systems
ME_TRACE_remainder: Agency as repeated branch-selection under constraint, not magic outside causality.

Groundhog_expression: Freedom appears as selection that changes the future selector.
ME_TRACE_remainder: Free will as operationally meaningful even if metaphysics remains unresolved.

Groundhog_expression: Repeated rule plus small deltas produces collapse, bounded growth, or escape.
ME_TRACE_remainder: Ethical complexity appears at the boundary of repetition, variation, memory, and feedback.

Groundhog_expression: The world resets, but memory carries identity and learning across loops.
Manipulation can generate apparent success but fails as genuine relation.
established_counterpart: virtue ethics / consent ethics / moral learning
ME_TRACE_remainder: Outcome appearance does not launder method.

Groundhog_expression: Repetition becomes livable only through relation, skill, patience, and care.
ME_TRACE_remainder: Bounded relation restores value-gradient under repetition overload.

Groundhog_expression: Release follows transformed policy, not maximum information or control.
established_counterpart: moral development / therapeutic change / spiritual transformation
ME_TRACE_remainder: The exit condition tests what the loop has trained the chooser to become.

Groundhog_expression: Repeated feedback can train care, but it can also train manipulation.
ME_TRACE_remainder: Ask what policy the loop rewards, not only whether the loop converges.
